# Jean le Rond d'Alembert

*1717 – 1783 · French · [The Enlightenment](../movements/enlightenment.md)*

French mathematician and philosopher, co-editor of the Encyclopédie, whose Preliminary Discourse he wrote, a manifesto of the spirit of the [Enlightenment](../movements/enlightenment.md).
